title: Strategic Narratives Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger strategic narratives foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Strategic Narratives Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Strategic Narratives Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good strategic narratives foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Strategic Narratives Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
